title: Partial forward sequencing reads of target genes used for PCR product verification of Pseudomonas aeruginosa
author: Kirtikliene, Tatjana
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: These are partial gene sequencing reads obtained with forward primers only. The sequences were generated to confirm the identity of PCR products and are not full‑length gene sequences. Data are provided as FASTA files.
steps_raw: These are partial gene sequencing reads obtained with forward primers only. The sequences were generated to confirm the identity of PCR products and are not full‑length gene sequences. Data are provided as FASTA files.
keywords: PCR, Partial sequences, Gene identity, Forward sequencing
